overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through a forested hillside during golden hour. The character travels past wooden fences and stone walls with rocky outcrops and pine trees visible in the natural landscape.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, approaching a large rock formation ahead

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running parallel to the path on the left side
winding dirt trail with patches of grass and gravel
large rocky cliff formation visible in the distance ahead on the right
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit forest trail with a wooden fence running along the left side. Geralt walks forward along the dirt path toward a large rock outcrop visible ahead on the right, with pine trees and clear blue sky in the background.

events.description: wooden fence transitions to stone wall on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking forward, passing the large rock formation as it recedes to the right

entered.detail: low stone wall replacing the wooden fence on the left side of the path
large fallen tree trunk visible among the vegetation on the right

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses, the wooden fence gives way to a stone wall on the left while the large rock outcrop that was ahead is now passed and recedes into the distance on the right. The path continues winding through the grassy hillside with warm sunlight casting long shadows.

events.description: large rock outcrop passes completely out of view behind the tree line

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the path with open landscape visible ahead and stone wall remaining on the left

entered.detail: rolling hills visible in the far distance on the left side
gentle grassy incline rising on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens up to reveal distant hills on the left as the large rock formation disappears behind the trees. The stone wall continues alongside the path but falls slightly behind as the terrain opens up, with grassy slopes rising on the right.

events.description: path becomes more shaded as denser forest closes in from the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing up the winding path as it curves into a more densely forested area

entered.detail: thick cluster of trees and bushes closing in on the right side of the path
scattered rocks and boulders visible among the vegetation on the right

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the path becoming more enclosed as dense forest closes in from the right, casting shadows across the trail. The stone wall fades into the distance behind as Geralt continues walking into the increasingly shaded woodland area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail that transitions from an open, sunlit hillside into a shaded woodland. It begins on a dirt path bordered by a wooden fence on the left, moving forward toward a prominent rock outcrop under a clear blue sky. As the camera progresses, the wooden fence gives way to a stone wall and the rock formation recedes into the distance, while warm sunlight casts long shadows across the grassy terrain. The scene then opens up to reveal distant hills on the left as the stone wall falls behind and the landscape expands into rising grassy slopes. Finally, the path becomes more enclosed as dense forest closes in from the right, shifting the lighting from golden brilliance to the deep shadows of the woodland.
